seoTitle: Commissariat Point vs Concordia — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Commissariat Point and Concordia. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Commissariat Point vs Concordia: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Commissariat Point and Concordia.
heading: Commissariat Point vs Concordia — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Commissariat Point, South Australia and Concordia, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Commissariat Point has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Concordia (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Commissariat Point or Concordia safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Commissariat Point has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Concordia scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Commissariat Point scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Concordia scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Commissariat Point or Concordia?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Commissariat Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
